app.aiCommandStubHint: Intelligent commands will ship in a future release.
app.syncBlockingHint: Editing stays off until data loads — so tasks are not lost if the network drops mid-sync.
app.syncErrorGeneric: Could not load or save data. Check your network and try again.
app.syncErrorRegionalHint: In Russia, the app host (Vercel) and API (Supabase) are sometimes unreachable without a VPN — see web/README.md (“Access from Russia”) for team rollout options. A full fix needs a dedicated deploy or proxy (phase 12, ideas in Brief summary).
app.colorHexHint: Stored as palette swatch: {{name}} (nearest to your input).
app.colorSwatchesHint: Recently picked colors first, then the full palette. HEX and the native picker stay in sync with the swatches.
app.backlogHint: Clear the date or use “Backlog only” so the task is not tied to a day.
app.estimateHint: For a task with a planned date (not backlog), enter hours and/or minutes. Minutes are 0–59; total at most 24 h.
app.estimateRequiredWhenPlanned: Tasks with a planned date need a time estimate.
app.estimateInvalid: Use whole numbers: hours ≥ 0, minutes 0–59, total at most 24 h.
app.confirmDeleteTaskWithChecklist: This task has checklist items. Delete it and them?
app.confirmDeleteTaskEntire: Delete this task entirely? This cannot be undone.
app.confirmSkipOccurrenceForDay: Remove this task from the plan for {{date}} only? The repeat series will stay.
app.doubleConfirmEnable: Require a second confirmation before counting as done
app.doubleConfirmHintShort: First tap starts the timer; confirm again before the window closes, or the completion is not recorded.
app.doubleConfirmHintEdit: Interval is the wait before the second prompt; grace is how long after that you can still confirm. Empty fields use defaults (+10 / +30 minutes).
app.doubleConfirmPendingInEditor: Waiting for the second confirmation for this day. You can cancel and try again from the card.
app.overlapConfirm: This overlaps another task by about {{minutes}} minutes. Continue?
app.completionOnlyToday: You can only toggle completion on calendar today — switch to Today’s day view.
app.createTaskCloseHintPristine: No task will be created and nothing will be saved to drafts.
app.createTaskCloseHintDraft: Your edits will be saved to Drafts. Date/time rules are not applied to drafts—fix them before the final save.
app.createTaskCloseHintLost: Editing is disabled — unsaved changes will be lost.
app.createTaskSaveRequirementsBodyPlanned: task title and a valid time estimate (hours and/or minutes).
app.createTaskPastDate: The planned date cannot be in the past.
app.createTaskPastClockToday: For today’s date, start or end time cannot be before now.
app.createTaskEstimateExceedsDay: With this start time, the estimate runs past midnight — the task doesn’t fit in the same calendar day.
app.createTaskEstimateExceedsDayEnd: With this end time, the estimate doesn’t fit in the same day (work would start before midnight).
app.recurrenceAnchorPast: The series anchor date can’t be in the past (relative to today’s local date).
app.estimateExceedsRestOfCalendarDay: The estimate is longer than the rest of the calendar day until midnight. Set a start/end time or reduce the estimate. (Custom working hours will come later.)
app.recurrenceEditHint: Day-by-day completion resets when you change the recurrence rule or anchor date.
app.weekGridHint: Slots show tasks with start or end time and duration (default 30 min if estimate missing). Tasks completed for that calendar day are hidden (including recurring tasks marked done that day).

settings.title: Settings
settings.intro: Seed backup, planning, notifications, account, and legal links. Account deletion with recovery window ships in the next phase 7 update.

tabs.generalIntro: Interface language, sign-in password, and legal documents.
tabs.privacyIntro: Seed backup, security event log, and restoring access to encrypted data.
tabs.planningIntro: Priorities, groups, and the End-of-Day ritual.
tabs.notificationsIntro: Web Push delivery mode and test messages.

settings.seedHint: Seed is stored locally. Copy it on onboarding or add export later.
settings.seedBackupHelp: Your seed and KDF password are the only way to recover encrypted data. Keep a copy outside this browser.

securityLog.title: Security log
securityLog.intro: Sign-in, vault sync, and other account security events.
securityLog.previewNote: Sample events for now; a full server-backed log is planned post-MVP.

settings.seedMissing: No seed in this browser. Complete onboarding or import a seed at /onboarding.
settings.seedWarningBody: Losing your seed or KDF password means permanent loss of vault access. The Motivator team cannot recover your data.
settings.seedWarningBullet1: Do not paste the seed into chats, email, or casual screenshots.
settings.seedWarningBullet2: Store an offline copy (paper, password manager, encrypted file).
settings.seedWarningBullet3: The QR code encodes the same seed — show it only on devices you trust.
settings.seedWarningAck: I understand the risks and want to reveal the seed
settings.seedQrHint: QR to move to another device (private setting only).
settings.seedQrUnavailable: Could not generate a QR code in this browser.
settings.sectionPlanningHelp: Priority labels, groups, and End-of-Day ritual.
settings.sectionAccountHelp: Interface language and email sign-in password.
settings.sectionLegalHelp: Policies and a feedback channel. Placeholder copy until final legal text is published.
settings.signOutConfirm: Sign out? The seed and derivation password will be removed from this browser. To open the same tasks again you will need the same seed and password as during setup.
settings.cannotDeleteDefault: The default group cannot be deleted.
settings.priorityLabelsHelp: Shown on tasks and filters. Stored in your encrypted vault.
settings.accountPasswordHelp: For Supabase email login. Your current password is verified before setting a new one.
settings.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 6 characters.
settings.passwordSameAsOld: New password matches the current one.
settings.testingGeneralHelp: Override “now” to exercise the planner and reports (this browser only). Available to admin and beta_tester roles.
settings.roadmapGeneralHelp: Roadmap, release notes, and open questions — Admin panel → Brief summary (admin and beta_tester).
settings.roadmapIntroModal: A ring shows shipped phases 0–6 of 13 toward MVP 1.0.0. Below: shipped, plan, release notes, ideas, and open questions. Admins also have the full page under Admin panel → Brief summary. Data: src/data/productRoadmap.ts; maintenance: web/README.md.
settings.roadmapImplementedHint: Phases 0–6 per the MVP plan; open “Details” under each phase for task bullets.
settings.roadmapMvpHint: Remaining work to 1.0.0 per obsidian-motivator/17-План-реализации-MVP.md. Under each phase summary there’s an “In simple words” line. Open “Details” for bullets inside each phase.
settings.roadmapReleaseNotesHint: Timeline by calendar dates from the file (nothing is hidden by date). One section per work day; within a day, sub-blocks are shown in descending `releasedInVersion` order; multiple edits in a block are a bullet list; plain-language notes sit under their own collapsible. Data: RELEASE_NOTES_BLOCKS (productRoadmap.ts).
settings.roadmapMvpProgressCaption: {{pct}}% · {{done}} of {{total}} roadmap phases shipped (0–6 done, 7–13 planned to release)
settings.roadmapReleaseNotePlainLead: What it means for you — no code jargon.
settings.roadmapIdeasHint: No fixed dates; expand one thematic group at a time. Headers show how many ideas are in each group; within a group, lower order = higher in the list. Post-MVP priorities are revised separately.
settings.roadmapOpenQuestionsHint: Product notes without a deadline — not the release checklist.
settings.roadmapOpenQuestionBacklogUx: How should we gently surface a large backlog (dozens of tasks): summary, capped list, dedicated screen — without pressure in the “not closed for today” block?
settings.roadmapOpenQuestionCpt: Typing reflection answers in-app is planned post-MVP; see “Ideas for later” in this same modal.
settings.roadmapOpenQuestionEodAuto: EOD (End of day): should the ritual be **auto-completed** when the user **did not** finish it manually — and how to do that without harming streaks and reports?
settings.eodHelp: Evening closure and DR-013 streak accounting. Turn off if you do not use the ritual.
settings.eodToggle: Show End day button on the Day tab (filters toolbar)
settings.eodAutoCloseHelp: When enabled, any **past** local calendar day that had **at least one** planned-for-day task is automatically added to completed EOD dates (same as finishing the ritual). That lets the Day tab show the soft “still open” tint after the day is considered closed. Days with no planned tasks are skipped. Only works when the ritual toggle above is on.
settings.eodAutoCloseToggle: Automatically mark the day closed once the calendar day has passed
settings.eodPushReminderToggle: Remind at the chosen time if today’s ritual is not done yet
settings.eodPushReminderHelp: Once per day at local time (ritual enabled and today not yet in completed EOD dates). Requires hybrid/full notification mode and a cron hitting the send-due Edge function.
settings.eodPushReminderNeedNotifications: Turn notifications on (not “off”) so the reminder can be scheduled.
settings.notificationsHelp: The mode is stored in your encrypted vault. In hybrid and full modes, the client syncs a schedule of task start/end times to Supabase after decrypt (see web/README). Actual push delivery requires the Edge Function and a cron job configured for your project.
settings.notificationsModeFull: Full — server stores times and optionally task titles
settings.notificationsModeHybridHint: Hybrid: the server gets **time**, **event kind**, and a task id for deep links — **no** task title in plaintext; notification copy **differs** between window start and end.
settings.notificationsModeFullHint: Full: **task titles** may be stored in plaintext on the server for richer notification text — use only if you accept that trade-off.
settings.notificationsEnablePush: Allow OS notifications and save this device
settings.notificationsPushOk: Push subscription saved for this device.
settings.notificationsSwMissing: No active service worker (use a production build or an installed PWA with SW registered).
settings.notificationsVapidMissing: VITE_VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY is not set in the build env — see web/README and .env.example.
settings.qaSectionHelp: For admin and beta_tester roles: file a bug as a GitHub issue via the server (the repo token never ships to the browser). Configure Edge secrets and deploy file-defect — see web/README.
settings.fileDefectModalHelp: Describe the problem briefly. The issue will include the app version and (optionally) the page path; vault contents are never sent.
settings.fileDefectModalChecklist: Helpful: where it reproduces, once vs every time, what you clicked. Email and task contents are not sent to GitHub.
settings.fileDefectTitlePlaceholder: e.g. On /app, estimate not saved after …
settings.fileDefectDescriptionPlaceholder: Context: what you did, what you saw, whether you expected different behavior.
settings.fileDefectExpectedHint: Optional. Briefly: what should have happened.
settings.fileDefectExpectedPlaceholder: e.g. After Save, the modal closes and the task shows the new estimate.
settings.fileDefectActualPlaceholder: e.g. Modal closes but the list still shows the old estimate.
settings.fileDefectIncludeUserAgent: Include browser User-Agent in the report (helps layout/mobile issues)
settings.fileDefectStepsHint: Optional. A numbered list helps reproduce faster.
settings.fileDefectIncludeRoute: Include the current page path in the report
settings.fileDefectSuccess48: Thanks! We’ll try to review it within 48 hours.
settings.fileDefectScreenshotsLabel: Screenshots (up to 2, 3 MB each, PNG / JPEG / WebP)
settings.fileDefectScreenshotsHint: Files upload to private storage; the issue will include time-limited links. Drag files here, use the button, or focus this area (click or Tab) and paste an image (Ctrl+V / ⌘V).
settings.fileDefectScreenshotsRegionAria: Screenshot attachments: drag files, add via button, or paste an image from the clipboard when this area is focused.
settings.fileDefectRecommendSteps: The description is long — please add reproduction steps below if you can.
settings.fileDefectTechBlockTitle: Technical details that will be sent

fileDefectErrors.forbidden: Not allowed: you need the admin or beta_tester role in Supabase (app_metadata.motivator_role).
fileDefectErrors.invalid_body: Check the form: title and description are required and must be within length limits.
fileDefectErrors.payload_too_large: The text is too long — shorten the description or steps.
fileDefectErrors.github_not_configured: GitHub or the defect repo is not configured on the server (Edge secrets).
fileDefectErrors.github_auth_error: GitHub rejected the token: verify Issues write access for the configured repo.
fileDefectErrors.github_rate_limit: GitHub rate limit: wait and try again.
fileDefectErrors.github_error: Could not create the GitHub issue. Try again later or contact an admin.
fileDefectErrors.supabase_env_missing: Supabase environment variables for the function are missing on the server.
fileDefectErrors.role_lookup_failed: Could not verify your role on the server. Try again later.
fileDefectErrors.invalid_attachments: Check attachments: at most two files from your draft folder.
fileDefectErrors.label_not_allowed: A label is not allowed on the server. Pick another type or contact an admin.
fileDefectErrors.rate_limited: Too many submissions in a row. Wait a bit and try again.
fileDefectErrors.storage_signed_url_failed: Could not prepare screenshot links for GitHub. Try without attachments or later.
fileDefectErrors.invalid_file_type: Only PNG, JPEG, and WebP are allowed.
fileDefectErrors.file_too_large: Each file must be 3 MB or smaller.
fileDefectErrors.upload_failed: Upload failed. Check your network and permissions.

notifications.label: Push
notifications.title: Notifications / push
notifications.description: What happens with the notification: when, on which screen, and what you expected instead.

planner_day.label: Day
planner_day.title: Planner: Day tab
planner_day.description: What went wrong on the day view: tasks, filters, estimates, rendering.

week_view.label: Week
week_view.title: Planner: Week view
week_view.description: Issue in the week grid or week navigation.

settings_block.label: Settings
settings_block.title: Settings page
settings_block.description: Something broken in account settings, EOD, notifications, etc.

sync_vault.label: Sync
sync_vault.title: Sync / vault
sync_vault.description: Mismatches after sign-in, decrypt errors, changes not sticking.

settings.adminRolesHelp: Admin only: Supabase Auth users and motivator_role (admin / beta tester / regular user). Deploy Edge **admin-motivator-roles** and set Supabase URL, anon, and service_role secrets — see web/README. **Custom** per-feature access (beyond fixed roles) is planned post-MVP.
settings.adminRolesEmpty: No users match the current filter.
settings.adminRolesSelfHint: If you remove your own admin role, this block disappears after the change — assign roles again via Dashboard or SQL.
settings.adminRolesConfirmSelfDemote: Remove your own administrator role? Admin overview will disappear until rights are restored in the Dashboard.
settings.adminRolesConfirmSelfDemoteAgain: Confirm again: you will lose administrator access in this app.

adminRolesErrors.forbidden: You need the admin role in app_metadata.motivator_role.
adminRolesErrors.supabase_env_missing: Supabase environment variables for the function are missing on the server.
adminRolesErrors.role_lookup_failed: Could not verify your role on the server.
adminRolesErrors.list_failed: Could not load the user list.
adminRolesErrors.overview_failed: Could not load the admin overview.

settings.adminSectionHelp: Roles live in Supabase Auth → user → **App metadata**: key **motivator_role** (`admin`, `beta_tester`; omit key for a regular user). Bootstrap the first admin in the Dashboard or SQL. After that, admins can change roles on **/settings** (Users & roles block, Edge **admin-motivator-roles**). **Testing** and **File a defect** (**file-defect**) are for **admin** and **beta_tester**; see web/README. **Brief summary** on **/app** is for every signed-in user.

eod.title: End of day
eod.reportIntro: Read-only summary for the selected calendar day: what was done and what stayed open among ritual tasks. You can’t complete a past day here — view only.
eod.reportAlreadyDone: End-of-day ritual for this date was already marked complete.
eod.intro: First, your **plan for this calendar day**: wins and what’s still open. Completing the ritual is saved to your vault and needed for a full DR-013 streak.
eod.sectionPlanRemaining: Planned for the day — not closed ({{count}})
eod.emptyRemaining: Everything planned for this day is closed or excluded from the ritual.
eod.backlogIntro: Tasks **without a planned date** are not treated as “not closed for the day.” They’re a separate bucket worth revisiting when you can.
eod.chartAriaProgress: {{pctStr}}%. Progress by task shares: {{doneSumStr}} of {{taskCountStr}} tasks.
eod.chartEmptyPlan: No tasks planned for this day — the ring shows an empty outline.
eod.alreadyDone: This day’s ritual is already marked complete.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Computed on-device after decrypting the vault (DR-007). Completion marks include today; the daily chart covers completed calendar days through yesterday.
reports.kpiStreakHint: DR-013 streak: requires a completed End-of-Day ritual for each day in the chain plus the day-plan rule (see decision log).
reports.kpiCompletionRate: Days with at least one completion
reports.hintKpiStreak: How many consecutive calendar days ending today satisfy DR-013: End-of-Day ritual completed for each day in the chain and the day-plan rule (when there are planned tasks).
reports.hintKpiCompletionRate: Share of days in the selected window where at least one task was marked completed on that calendar day.
reports.hintKpiTotalMarks: Sum of all completion marks in the window: each recurring occurrence closed on its day plus each completed one-off task counts once.
reports.hintChartDaily: Each bar is how many tasks were marked completed on that calendar day (recurring tasks count per occurrence; one-off tasks on their planned day). Today is not included in the chart window.
reports.hintFailedRecurring: Recurring series: how many scheduled occurrences in the window were missed (the day has passed and there is no completion for that date). Rows are grouped by series.
reports.hintFailedOneOff: One-off tasks whose planned date is in the past and which are still not marked done; shows up to five with the earliest planned dates in the window.
reports.dr013Body: The KPI above already reflects DR-013 once the ritual is completed and vault data satisfies the rule.
reports.failedRecurringTitle: Often missed: recurring (grouped by series, DR-008)
reports.failedOneOffTitle: One-off tasks with overdue plan (top 5 in window, DR-008)
reports.emptyFailed: Nothing to show for this window.

home.title: A planner that respects your rhythm
home.subtitle: Minimal web app: sign-in, client-side encryption, tasks.
home.docsHint: Docs — obsidian-motivator folder in the repo
home.heroSubtitle: A planner encrypted on your device: day, week, and month views. Only ciphertext leaves your machine — no trackers, no noise.
home.feature1Body: Tasks and settings are encrypted in the browser before cloud sync.
home.feature2Body: Daily plan, weekly timeblocking, and a month overview in one UI.
home.feature3Body: End-of-day, streaks, and analytics — computed client-side after decrypt.

login.subtitle: Tasks are encrypted on device; only ciphertext goes to the server.
login.confirmEmailInfo: Account created. Confirm your email from the message, then sign in. Check Spam if needed.
login.envHint: Set {{url}} and {{key}} in {{env}} and on Vercel.
login.networkRegionalHint: This looks like the app host or API being unreachable from Russia. Team rollout options are in web/README.md (“Access from Russia”).
login.forgotPasswordIntro: We will email a link to reset your account password (not the vault derivation password).
login.forgotPasswordSent: If an account exists for this email, a message was sent. Check Spam.
login.registerPdConsent: I agree to personal data processing (<link>policy</link>).
login.registerPdRequired: Personal data consent is required to register.

onboarding.title: Encryption key
onboarding.intro: Seed is combined with a derivation password (optional in V1 — less secure). After sign-out the seed is cleared — to open the same tasks again, paste the same seed and derivation password as the first time.
onboarding.restoreIntro: Encrypted data already exists on the server. Paste your saved seed and derivation password from the first setup.
onboarding.securityNotice: Never share your seed. Motivator / Мотиватор support will never ask for it.
onboarding.setupIntro: Generate a seed, store it safely, and confirm you did. Without the seed after sign-out, data cannot be recovered.
onboarding.setupSavedAck: I saved the seed in a safe place
onboarding.errSave: Could not save key. Try again.

admin.accessIntro: Assign motivator_role for accounts. Per-feature **custom** access (beyond fixed roles) is planned post-MVP — see Brief summary → Ideas.

dashboard.title: Overview
dashboard.authMetricsHint: “Last sign-in” is Supabase Auth login time, not every app visit.
dashboard.summaryMetricsHint: Summary from Auth plus server metadata (vault, push, defects). Vault plaintext is never sent. “Vault sync” is the last ciphertext write time.
dashboard.usersMetricsHint: “Last sign-in” is Auth. “Vault sync” is ciphertext upload time (not every visit). Amber = no sync for more than {{days}} days.
dashboard.listDegraded: Some server metrics are unavailable — Auth data only.
dashboard.vaultSyncHint: Last vault write on server; older than {{days}} days is highlighted

tabs.summaryIntro: Key metrics from Supabase Auth accounts. Full list and roles — Users tab.
tabs.usersIntro: Account list with registration and last sign-in dates; assign motivator_role.

admin.roadmapIntro: MVP roadmap, dated release notes, post-release ideas, and open questions. Data source: src/data/productRoadmap.ts; maintenance rules: web/README.md.
admin.testingIntro: Override “now” to exercise the planner and reports: the app treats the chosen date and time as calendar “today”, not the device clock. Stored in this browser only.
admin.testingWarning: Not saved to the vault and not synced across devices. Turn off the override before normal use.
admin.testingInvalidDatetime: Enter a valid date and time.
admin.testingScopeHint: Affects Day / Week / Month, EOD, overdue rules, reports, and auto-EOD on vault load. Task updatedAt and some push logic may still use real time.

aiAssistant.title: AI assistant
aiAssistant.subtitle: Prototype
aiAssistant.prototypeNote: The AI chat is not connected to your vault yet — UI preview only.
aiAssistant.welcome: Hi! I will help plan your day once this ships. For now, this shows how the conversation will look.
aiAssistant.example2: What is left on today’s plan?
aiAssistant.inputHint: Sending is disabled until the model is connected.

vault.decryptError: Could not decrypt vault. Check seed and password.
vault.decryptHelpBody: The server returned a vault, but the key in this browser does not match. Editing is disabled until access is restored.
vault.decryptHelpStepSeed: Confirm this browser has the same seed used when the vault was created (Settings → seed backup).
vault.decryptHelpStepPassword: Check the KDF password — same as onboarding (empty if you left it empty).
vault.decryptHelpStepSupport: If seed or password changed on another device, import the current pair or use feedback in Settings.
vault.recoverKeyHint: Paste the current seed and derivation password. Sign-out is not required.

legal.cookieBody: We use essential cookies and localStorage for sign-in, seed, and preferences. No third-party analytics in this build.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.body: MVP draft. Final text will be published separately.
privacy.placeholder: The full Motivator privacy policy will appear here. Until then, see README and specs (DR-009). Set VITE_LEGAL_PRIVACY_URL for an external page.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.placeholder: Service terms will appear here. Use VITE_LEGAL_TERMS_URL for an external document.

personalData.title: Personal data
personalData.placeholder: Personal data processing notice will appear here. VITE_LEGAL_PERSONAL_DATA_URL for an external page.

prototype.bannerBody: Design 2.0 (Stitch) mock. Fictional data; controls do not affect the live product.
prototype.settingsSectionHelp: Previews of screens outside current MVP — for design alignment.

deepFocus.title: Deep Focus (prototype)
deepFocus.intro: Deep work session with timer and bio/AI blocks — not in MVP.

aiInsights.title: AI Insights (prototype)
aiInsights.intro: Model-assisted analytics — separate from the Reports tab.
aiInsights.item3: EOD ritual: 4 days in a row

securityLog.title: Security log (prototype)
securityLog.intro: Sign-in, sync, and key events — planned post-MVP.

admin.title: Admin dashboard (prototype)
admin.intro: Operator overview; part of this exists under Users & roles.
